channel.title: flove making-of — theme questions
channel.description: New theme design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: What theming/branding approach for docs?
item.description:
• Dark theme (manual toggle) — Default dark, user can switch to light. Standard approach, moderate code. • Auto-detect system theme — Follow OS dark/light setting. No toggle needed, less user control. • Both (toggle + auto) — Auto-detect with manual override. Most flexible, most code. • Always light — No theming — always light. Simplest, but mismatches flove's dark aesthetic. • Always dark — No theming — always dark. Matches flove, simplest, no toggle.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Always dark
